en: Bloom gloriously, O flowers, dance and whirl!
Dye tomorrow in rainbow colors
What I'm about to sing is an ultra-super
ever-so-charming dream-color rhythm
Precisely because it's "charming/odd," my heart is drawn to it
Well, that kind of talk doesn't really matter
What matters is a heart that enjoys itself
Are you ready? Don't be late, okay?
Ah! Wait a sec!
In a town where the festival music shines, tie your shoelaces
On 3-2-1, leap out!
I wanna get excited!
Don't you wanna feel your heart pound?!
Make me giddy!
Had enough? No no, not yet, not yet
How shall I put it — can't you stop?
How shall I put it — I can't stop!
Don't you still want to see tomorrow's scenery?
Bloom gloriously! You too — yoisa! yoisa!
Because this is the greatest festival
Grooving along to the festival-music rhythm
Smiles in full bloom ➡︎ infinity, It's Alright!
Dance and whirl! Dye it all on "one-two-three"
Tell me your color — the color I can't help wondering about
That kind of vibe is fine — yoisa! yoisa!
Let me hear the beat of your dream
What I'll sing next is an ultra-super
ever-so-charming dream-color rhythm
By any chance — did I just say this a moment ago?
Well, that kind of talk doesn't really matter
What matters is a believing heart
Leave it to the rhythm only you can hear
Ah! Wait a sec!
Enough to light up, more and more, a town where the starry sky sparkles
On 3-2-1, leap out!
I wanna get excited!
Don't you wanna feel your heart pound?!
Make me giddy!
Had enough? No no, not yet, not yet
How shall I put it — won't this ever end?
How shall I put it — I can't let it end?
Tonight too, embracing the dream-colors
Bloom gloriously! You too — soiya! soiya!
Because this is the greatest festival
Hearts pounding to an ambiguous rhythm
Full bloom in the sky ➡︎ infinity, It's Alright!
Soar up! Dye it all on "one-two-three"
Tell me your color — the color we'll keep secret
That kind of vibe is fine — yoisa! yoisa!
Let's carve out the beat of the dream
Bloom gloriously! You too — yoisa! yoisa!
Because this is the greatest festival
Grooving along to the festival-music rhythm
Smiles in full bloom ➡︎ infinity, It's Alright!
Dance and whirl! Dye it all on "one-two-three"
Tell me your color — the color I can't help wondering about
That kind of vibe is fine — yoisa! yoisa!
Let me hear the beat of your dream
That's why I can't stop!

きれいだね

en: Because I'm an idol, I keep on challenging myself
I dream together with you — is it so wrong to be clumsy?
I'll bloom gloriously
My first event — zero demand by default
Someone like me had a dream:
a way of living called "idol" —
I yearned for it
"Invincible elite," "a smile that's a cheat code" —
you, who'll look at a me like this,
what part of me do you like?
Please forgive my selfishness
Stage experience points — tears welling up
Even so, there's absolutely no way I want to lose
Load the message onto the cherry blossoms and deliver it —
may it overflow with love
Because I'm an idol, I keep on challenging myself
I dream together with you — is it so wrong to be clumsy?
Bloom gloriously!
I won't let it end as just a daydream
True to myself, cherry-blossom pink, you know
Polished-up skills, showing my true ability —
the days I can enjoy have been increasing
I'm living as an idol —
thanks to you
The ahoge is cute! A guaranteed-win route!
Come follow along with a me like this, okay?!
Even my clumsy side gets forgiven —
isn't that the strongest?!
The painful things, the things I want to say —
I swallow them down hard
With a smile, I want to increase smiles
Like the sakura front delivering spring
to your town
Being an idol — that's the one thing I don't want to give up
I want to captivate you — I'll challenge my ideal
Dash through!
I'll show you the greatest scenery
You can trust in it — the cherry blossoms
Come on, let's all bloom together,
dye the world in full-bloom pink
Ah, these tears, you know,
they're not the sad kind,
so don't worry —
isn't it beautiful?
Because I'm an idol, I keep on challenging myself
I dream together with you — is it so wrong to be clumsy?
Bloom gloriously!
I won't let it end as just a daydream
True to myself, cherry-blossom pink, you know

jp: 痛くて目を塞いでも聞こえちゃう 不安ショー

en: Even if I cover my eyes because it hurts, I can still hear it — the anxiety show
Worrying won't change anything, so one way or another I've gotta just do it
If I'm gonna break, might as well break in a way that's easy to fix —
what shape can I aim to become, I wonder
A jump with no run-up, a dive with no bungee cord —
today's me, I kinda want to praise her, y'know?
I want to breathe, I want to resonate more
Hey, I might get to see a version beyond me
My delusions won't stop — Fashion Beat
Wanna take a sniff? I couldn't spit out an "oh yeah?" at a dream, no way
The one who'll make it come true — is it me myself, or am I leaving it to someone else?
I just, just want to beat my own self
New Fashion Beat — I devour love
Losing? No thanks — it doesn't have any taste
An evolution that turns to ash however many times
The personification of a bug, reborn
I won't rot away for you yet, not yet — that's right, not gonna
The thing jabbing prickly-prickly at me — I'm sick and tired of it
Sorry, but the gloomy-messy wordplay — please, put it away properly
I myself am my rival — the obvious interpretation
What should I do? — even though I already know
A jump with no run-up, a dive with no bungee cord —
today's me, I don't feel like I can do it
"Don't mind it" — isn't that impossible?
Hey, even comparing me to anyone besides me
is damn boring, y'know — how annoying — Fashion Beat
Wanna take a sniff? I couldn't spit out an "oh yeah?" at a dream, no way
The one who'll make it come true — is it me myself, or am I leaving it to someone else?
I just, just want to beat my own self
New Fashion Beat — I devour love
Losing? No thanks — it doesn't have any taste
An evolution that turns to ash however many times
The personification of a bug, reborn
I won't rot away for you yet, not yet — that's right, not gonna
I can't stop — it's not someone else, it's me myself
The personification of a bug, reborn
I won't kindly scatter away for you yet, not yet — that's right, not gonna
